# L'Atelier Elena

> L'Atelier Elena is a design-and-build architecture studio based in Lake Forest, Illinois, working with clients remotely across the United States. The studio designs and builds private residences end to end, from the first hand-drawn pencil line to the last set stone: architecture, interiors, construction, landscape siting and 3D visualization, all kept under a single hand. Founded in 2021 by Elena, its founder and principal.

## Summary

- **What it is:** A boutique design-and-build studio for private, custom homes.
- **Philosophy:** "Homes that are authored, not assembled." Every arch, dormer and stair is drawn by hand, then carried unchanged into stone, oak and light. Quiet, timeless, personal luxury.
- **Services:** Design, construction, working with architects and engineers, remodeling, consultation, advice before buying land, and 3D renders of the design.
- **Location:** Lake Forest, Illinois, USA. Available for projects remotely nationwide.
- **Materials language:** Brick and limestone, cedar-shake roofs, white oak, light-colored walls, marble and brass.

## Pages

- [Home](https://latelierelena.com/): The studio, its philosophy, capabilities, method, the atelier (about Elena), and services.
- [Residence 854](https://latelierelena.com/residence-854.html): The studio's signature commission, a private home in Lake Forest, Illinois (completed 2024). An octagonal entrance tower, brick-and-limestone facade, and interiors of white oak, marble and brass, told as a chaptered story from sketch to finished home.

## Contact

- Email: info@latelierelena.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/elena-c-cracaoanu/
- New commissions are taken by invitation, a few at a time.
